date_notes: Bill 9 debate occurred June 2019. The earplug incident reported during committee/legislature sittings — exact date within June to confirm.
title_en: Premier distributes earplugs to caucus during labour bill debate
title_fr: Le premier ministre distribue des bouchons d'oreilles pendant le débat sur le projet de loi travail
description_en: During debate on Bill 9, which delayed public-sector wage arbitration, the Premier distributed earplugs to his caucus members — widely reported as a gesture dismissing labour opposition arguments.

opposition_response.name: Rachel Notley
opposition_response.description: Official Opposition characterized the gesture as contemptuous of workers and the legislative process.

verification_notes: CBC June 2019 confirmed in handoff; attach exact URL. Opposition response source needed.

update_log.note: Added R-085 (Bill 9 protests Jul 2019) as context for Bill 9 scope — 180,000 workers affected.
